zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory de Willoughby於1420年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Willoughby31歲，母親Margaret Freville20歲。她於1439年與Sir William de Belgrave在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1495年11月14日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory de Willoughby于1420年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Willoughby31岁，母亲Margaret Freville20岁。她于1439年与Sir William de Belgrave在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1495年11月14日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory de Willoughby was born in 1420, in Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Willoughby, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Freville, was 20. She married Sir William de Belgrave in 1439, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 14 November 1495, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory de Willoughby est née en 1420, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Willoughby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Freville, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Belgrave en 1439, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 novembre 1495, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory de Willoughby 1420 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Willoughby 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Freville 20. Sie hat 1439 in England, United Kingdom Sir William de Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 14. November 1495 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory de Willoughby è nata il nel 1420 nel Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Willoughby, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Freville, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Belgrave nel 1439, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 14 novembre 1495, nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marjory de Willoughbyが1420年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Willoughbyは31歳，母Margaret Frevilleは20歳であった。1439年にイギリスイギリスでSir William de Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1495年11月14日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory de Willoughby(이)가 1420년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Willoughby(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Freville(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir William de Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1495년 11월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory de Willoughby nasceu em 1420, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Willoughby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Freville, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Belgrave em 1439, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 14 de novembro de 1495, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory de Willoughby родилась в 1420 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Willoughby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Freville, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Belgrave в 1439 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 14 ноября 1495 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory de Willoughby nació en 1420, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Willoughby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Freville, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William de Belgrave en 1439, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 14 de noviembre de 1495, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
